summary: Independent R2 QA accepts M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001 at fixed implementation commit db65ad7d24ffcb710c909500f53987ae567d45ae. The prior P1 selected district inspector zh-CN localization blocker is fixed: route kinds, obligation kinds, obligation due labels, route summaries, and route-effect travel-day summaries now use the i18n foundation, and focused UI plus Playwright coverage rejects the prior player-mode leaks Road, road, Garrison, continuous, and English days in the selected district inspector.

tests_run.result: Clean before QA R2 handoff creation: ## feat/m7-district-inspector-quality.
Current HEAD was 91288b0dd9f879b73be256fd5999cdb61cb86cf8, a route/process commit after fixed implementation commit db65ad7d24ffcb710c909500f53987ae567d45ae.
Later delta is process-only: goal-mode-state, model-routing-state, task/thread registry, R2 writer handoff metadata, and writer-R2-to-QA route.

R2 diff changes only allowed paths: packages/ui/src/i18n.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, UI/E2E tests, project task/state/message/route files. No forbidden sim-core, sim-ai, protocol, save-format, map-renderer, platform, content-source/runtime/schema, docs gate/roadmap, release, telemetry, server, multiplayer, account, cloud-save, production-art, branding, M8, or manual-node-battle paths were modified.
Full task diff through R2 remains within allowed apps/web, packages/client-core, packages/ui, tests, .storybook, project/messages, and project task/state paths.
Task list emitted successfully; M7-DISTRICT-INSPECTOR-QUALITY-001 is REVIEW.
Ready tasks listed: M7-MAP-PRESENTATION-QUALITY-001, M7-PLAYER-GUIDANCE-LITE-001, M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001.
Vitest UI suite passed: 1 test file, 16 tests. The zh-CN selected inspector test asserts localized route/effect text and rejects Road, road, Garrison, continuous, and days.
Vitest client-core suite passed: 1 test file, 22 tests.
Vitest web suite passed: 1 test file, 9 tests.
Vite web build passed; existing large chunk warning remained.
Storybook static build passed and cleaned .tmp/storybook-static; existing large chunk warning remained.

Playwright Chromium suite passed: 19 tests. The M7 district inspector E2E switches to zh-CN on narrow viewport, verifies localized inspector text, rejects prior P1 tokens, checks bounded rendering, empty/error states, no horizontal overflow, and no console/page errors.
Format check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture boundary checks passed.

tests_run.command: focused source inspection: packages/ui/src/i18n.ts, packages/ui/src/index.tsx, tests/ui-m2-district-list.test.tsx, tests/e2e/web-shell.spec.ts
tests_run.result: Confirmed R2 helpers format district route kinds, obligation kinds, due labels, and travel-day summaries through i18n. Existing English days matches are outside the player-mode selected district inspector debug/workspace surfaces.

decisions: ACCEPT: prior P1 selected district inspector zh-CN localization blocker is fixed.
ACCEPT: player-mode selected district inspector no longer exposes Road, road, Garrison, continuous, or English days for the default selected district fixture.

ACCEPT: route kinds, obligation kinds, due labels, route summary kinds, and route-effect travel-day summaries use i18n helpers in packages/ui/src/index.tsx and message keys in packages/ui/src/i18n.ts.
ACCEPT: focused UI and Playwright tests would fail if the prior P1 tokens return in the selected district inspector.
ACCEPT: R2 keeps i18n outside sim-core, consumes existing read models/command previews, and introduces no protocol/schema/sim/save/map/platform/content/release/server/cloud/manual-node-battle scope.
risks: Unknown future due-label strings still fall back through formatReasonCode rather than a schema-enforced due-label enum; this is acceptable for the current read-model fixture and does not block R2.
Some older debug/developer workspaces still contain English labels such as M4 supply days; they are outside the selected district inspector/player-mode blocker reviewed here.
Current HEAD 91288b0d includes process route metadata after the requested R2 implementation commit; QA reviewed the fixed implementation commit and confirmed the later delta is process-only.
requested_action: Lead orchestrator may validate this QA R2 handoff and proceed with task integration. Do not mark the task CLOSED solely from this handoff until lead-side closure steps are complete.
